title: myTax 2017 Attributed personal services income
description: How to report attributed personal services income when you lodge your return using myTax.
keywords: Personal services income, PSI, attributed personal services income, myTax, e-tax, online tax return, etax

content_blocks.text: We have pre-filled your tax return with payment summary information provided to us. Check for attributed personal services income you received that is not pre-filled and ensure you add it.
You must complete this section if you provided personal services and you:

items: received a PAYG payment summary - business and personal services income showing an X against 'Personal services attributed income', or
had personal services income attributed to you.

content_blocks.text: If you received personal services income as a sole trader, do not complete this section. You must show this income at Personal services income in the Business/sole trader, partnership and trust income (including loss details) section. If you can't see it, go to the Personalise return screen and select the following:

items: 'You were a sole trader or had business income or losses, partnerships or trust distributions (not from a managed fund)' 'Business/Sole trader income or loss' 'Personal services income'.

content_blocks.text: For more information about personal services income and when it may be attributed to you, see Personal services income (PSI)

items: your PAYG payment summary - business and personal services income
details of any other personal services income attributed to you.

content_blocks.text: If you do not have all of your documents, contact the person who paid you.

items: For each payment summary that has not been pre-filled in your tax return, select Add and enter information into the corresponding fields.

content_text:
We have pre-filled your tax return with payment summary information provided to us. Check for attributed personal services income you received that is not pre-filled and ensure you add it.
You must complete this section if you provided personal services and you:
- received a PAYG payment summary - business and personal services income showing an X against 'Personal services attributed income', or
- had personal services income attributed to you.
If you received personal services income as a sole trader, do not complete this section. You must show this income at Personal services income in the Business/sole trader, partnership and trust income (including loss details) section. If you can't see it, go to the Personalise return screen and select the following:
- 'You were a sole trader or had business income or losses, partnerships or trust distributions (not from a managed fund)' 'Business/Sole trader income or loss' 'Personal services income'.
For more information about personal services income and when it may be attributed to you, see Personal services income (PSI)
## Completing this section
You will need:
- your PAYG payment summary - business and personal services income
- details of any other personal services income attributed to you.
If you do not have all of your documents, contact the person who paid you.
- For each payment summary that has not been pre-filled in your tax return, select Add and enter information into the corresponding fields.
- Select Save .
- Select Save and continue .
